mapper.sql: id, sys_no, project_id, data_status, audit_date, index1, index1score, index2, index2score, index3, index3score, index4, index4score, index5, index5score, index6, index6score, index7, index7score, index8, index8score, index9, index9score, index10, index10score, index11, index11score, index12, index12score, expert, audit_status, note, prj_type, mod_number
mapper.select: select id as rowId, sys_no as sysNo, project_id as projectId, data_status as dataStatus, audit_date as auditDate, index1, index1score, index2, index2score, index3, index3score, index4, index4score, index5, index5score, index6, index6score, index7, index7score, index8, index8score, index9, index9score, index10, index10score, index11,allot_count as allotCount, index11score, index12, index12score, expert, audit_status as auditStatus, note, prj_type as prjType, mod_number from srm_project_solicit_grade where id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_project_solicit_grade
data_status = #{projectSolicitGradeDto.dataStatus},
audit_status = #{projectSolicitGradeDto.auditStatus},
where id=#{projectSolicitGradeDto.rowId}
update srm_project_solicit_grade set is_cancel=1 where sys_no=#{sysNo} and project_id=#{ywRowId}
